text.title: Structural Design Patterns Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-structural-patterns.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.

Forbidden traits: adr_id pattern violation; signal too short; chosen_pattern enum violation; empty rejected; fit_score / cost_score out of [1,5]; missing guard_checks fields; review_trigger empty; version + date malformed.
